destiny.story.somewhere/1: The world does not announce where it places you. You wake far from any map you could have drawn — no village, no road, no name on the land. Wherever this is, it is yours to survive now.
destiny.story.jungle_pyramid/1: You push through dense vines to find the crumbling stones of an ancient temple. Whatever was worshipped here is long gone — but their traps are not.
destiny.story.pyramid/1: The desert swallowed this structure long before you arrived. Sand pours from the ceilings and the hieroglyphs glow faintly in the dark.
destiny.story.ruined_portal/1: A gateway to somewhere — or nowhere. The obsidian frame is shattered and overgrown. You wonder what passed through it last.
destiny.story.ruined_portal_desert/1: Half-buried in sand, the obsidian arch still hums faintly. Whoever built it here was either brave or lost.
destiny.story.ruined_portal_mountain/1: High in the peaks, the wind howls through a broken portal frame. The cold is sharp. The view is worth it.
destiny.story.ruined_portal_swamp/1: The portal sank into the bog long ago. Frogs watch you from the mud. The frame still stands, barely.
destiny.story.swamp_hut/1: A witch's hut tilts at the edge of a murky swamp. The door is open. The cauldron is still warm.
destiny.story.igloo/1: You dig yourself out of a snowbank to find a small igloo, smoke drifting from a hole in the roof. Someone lived here once.
